languages.text: Нет страшнее греха перед Неумирающим, чем попытка оспорить его решения. Слухи о деяниях странствующего философа Эоганна и его последователей разнеслись по всему Простору, и вердикт Кровавой Паутины был тверд и непререкаем. Кибелла лично претворила волю Неумирающего в реальность, и говорят, что манипулус Фебрус лишь горько улыбался, когда меч Ткача отделил его голову от тела.

There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.
languages.original_text: Нет страшнее греха перед Неумирающим, чем попытка оспорить его решения. Слухи о деяниях странствующего философа Эоганна и его последователей разнеслись по всему Простору, и вердикт Кровавой Паутины был тверд и непререкаем. Кибелла лично претворила волю Неумирающего в реальность, и говорят, что манипулус Фебрус лишь горько улыбался, когда меч Ткача отделил его голову от тела.

Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

languages.text: 不死の者に対する最大の罪は、その判断に異を唱えることである。放浪の哲学者エオグンとその信者たちの行いは、広大な宇宙に広がり、血の織りなすウェブの裁きは、揺るぎないものだった。キベラは不死の者の意志を現実のものにした。そしてマニピュラス・フェブルスは、紡ぎ手の刃が首を刎ねた時、苦い笑みを浮かべたという。
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

traits.locale_text: 不死の者に対する最大の罪は、その判断に異を唱えることである。放浪の哲学者エオグンとその信者たちの行いは、広大な宇宙に広がり、血の織りなすウェブの裁きは、揺るぎないものだった。キベラは不死の者の意志を現実のものにした。そしてマニピュラス・フェブルスは、紡ぎ手の刃が首を刎ねた時、苦い笑みを浮かべたという。

languages.text: 在不死之神眼中，质疑他的决定就是最大的罪过。流浪哲学家伊奥贡及其追随者的事迹传遍整个扩区，而织血罗网的裁决是坚决且不容置疑的。绮贝菈亲自执行了不死之神的意志。据说，当织网者手起刀落，将费布鲁斯这位曾经的操纵者身首分离时，他只是苦涩地笑了笑。
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

traits.locale_text: 在不死之神眼中，质疑他的决定就是最大的罪过。流浪哲学家伊奥贡及其追随者的事迹传遍整个扩区，而织血罗网的裁决是坚决且不容置疑的。绮贝菈亲自执行了不死之神的意志。据说，当织网者手起刀落，将费布鲁斯这位曾经的操纵者身首分离时，他只是苦涩地笑了笑。

languages.text: Il n'existe pas de plus grande transgression à l'encontre de l'Immortel que de remettre ses décisions en question. Alertée par les rumeurs qui se répandaient dans les Étendues à propos des agissements d'Eogunn, le philosophe errant, et de ses disciples, la Toile de Sang rendit un verdict sans appel. Kibellah se chargea elle-même d'accomplir la volonté de l'Immortel, et on raconte que le manipulus Februs se contenta d'esquisser un sourire amer alors que la lame de la tisseuse s'abattait sur son cou.
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

Kibellah se chargea elle-même d'accomplir la volonté de l'Immortel, et on raconte que le manipulus Februs se contenta d'esquisser un sourire amer alors que la lame de la tisseuse s'abattait sur son cou.

languages.text: No hay peor transgresión para el Inmortal que la de oponerse a Sus decisiones. Los rumores sobre los actos del filósofo errante Eogunn y sus seguidores se diseminaron por la Extensión, y el veredicto de la Red Sanguinolenta fue firme e incuestionable. Kibellah se encargó personalmente de hacer realidad la voluntad del Inmortal, y se dice que el manipulus Februs se limitó a sonreír con amargura cuando el filo de la tejedora separó su cabeza del resto de su cuerpo.
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

Los rumores sobre los actos del filósofo errante Eogunn y sus seguidores se diseminaron por la Extensión, y el veredicto de la Red Sanguinolenta fue firme e incuestionable. languages.text: Ölmeyen'in huzurunda onun kararlarına meydan okumaya çalışmaktan daha büyük bir suç yoktur. Gezgin filozof Eogunn ve takipçilerinin eylemlerine dair söylentiler tüm Enginliğe yayıldı. Kanipi Ağı'nın kararı kesin ve sorgulanamazdı. Kibellah bizzat Ölmeyen'in iradesini gerçekleştirdi ve söylentilere göre dokurun bıçağı kafasını gövdesinden ayırdığında Manipülus Februs yalnızca acı acı gülümsemiş.
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions. Rumours of the deeds of the wandering philosopher Eogunn and his followers spread throughout the Expanse, and the verdict of the Bloodspun Web was adamant and unquestionable. Kibellah personally made the Undying One's will a reality, and it is said that Manipulus Februs only smiled bitterly when the spinner's blade severed his head from his body.

languages.text: Es gibt kein schlimmeres Vergehen vor dem Todlosen, als seine Entscheidungen infrage zu stellen. Die Gerüchte über die Taten des wandernden Philosophen Eogunn und seiner Anhänger kursierten in der gesamten Ausdehnung, und das Urteil des Blutgesponnenen Netzes war unerbittlich und unbestreitbar. Kibellah selbst setzte den Willen des Todlosen in die Tat um, und es heißt, Manipulus Februs hätte nur verbittert gelächelt, als die Klinge der Spinnerin seinen Kopf vom Rumpf trennte.
languages.original_text: There is no greater transgression before the Undying One than to attempt to challenge his decisions.
